CONTACT: Jerry Purcell , Contract Specialist, Phone 3014157142, Email jerry.purcell@nrc.gov - Heriberto Colon Jr., Contracting Officer, Email Heriberto.Colon@nrc.gov
DESC: The U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has a requirement for a Nuclear Power Plant Simulator for its Technical Training Center (TTC) in Chattanooga, TN.
P: The solicitation and resultant contract shall be issued in accordance with FAR Subpart 13.5. The resultant purchase order will consist of a base period of one year (beginning on or about September 16, 2019) plus four one-year options to extend the term of the purchase order.
SUBJECT: SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE NRC TECHNICAL TRAINING CENTER SIMULATOR CONFIGURATION CONTROL PROGRAM
